title: Rivermark Compromise
content:
The Rivermark Compromise (1836) was a diplomatic agreement in which Ulric Jardine, chief negotiator of Confederation of Frosthaven, helped finalize terms at Lunaris.

Signing and terms.

The Rivermark Compromise was signed in Lunaris on 14 September 1836. The agreement established trade corridors and a joint commission chaired initially by Ulric Jardine.

Historical assessment.

Modern historians view the Rivermark Compromise as a stabilizing milestone, crediting Ulric Jardine's insistence on verifiable inspection clauses.
